channel.title: Stars on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stars on Arrans github.io

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: shadcn-ui/ui
item.description: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

item.title: invoke-ai/InvokeAI
item.description: Invoke is a leading creative engine for Stable Diffusion models, empowering professionals, artists, and enthusiasts to generate and create visual media using the latest AI-driven technologies. The solution offers an industry leading WebUI, and serves as the foundation for multiple commercial products.

item.title: google-gemini/gemini-cli
item.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

item.title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
item.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI 🔗 https://microsoft.github.io/generative-ai-for-beginners/

item.title: arran4/arrans_overlay
item.description: Arrans Gentoo Overlay

item.title: gravitational/teleport
item.description: The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

item.title: siyuan-note/siyuan
item.description: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

item.title: vercel/ai-chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: toeverything/AFFiNE
item.description: There can be more than Notion and Miro. AFFiNE(pronounced [ə‘fain]) is a next-gen knowledge base that brings planning, sorting and creating all together. Privacy first, open-source, customizable and ready to use.

item.title: ripienaar/free-for-dev
item.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: A modern, open-source, self-hosted knowledge management and note-taking platform designed for privacy-conscious users and organizations.

item.title: nlpxucan/WizardLM
item.description: LLMs build upon Evol Insturct: WizardLM, WizardCoder, WizardMath

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: Cysharp/ZLinq
item.description: Zero allocation LINQ with LINQ to Span, LINQ to SIMD, and LINQ to Tree (FileSystem, JSON, GameObject, etc.) for all .NET platforms and Unity, Godot.

item.title: schollz/croc
item.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

item.title: brunodev85/winlator
item.description: Android application for running Windows applications with Wine and Box86/Box64

item.title: imputnet/cobalt
item.description: best way to save what you love

item.title: swaggo/swag
item.description: Automatically generate RESTful API documentation with Swagger 2.0 for Go.

item.title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Assistants API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-4o, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active project.

item.title: m1k1o/neko
item.description: A self hosted virtual browser that runs in docker and uses WebRTC.

item.title: alacritty/alacritty
item.description: A cross-platform, OpenGL terminal emulator.

item.title: f/awesome-chatgpt-prompts
item.description: This repo includes ChatGPT prompt curation to use ChatGPT and other LLM tools better.

item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: actualbudget/actual
item.description: A local-first personal finance app

item.title: louislam/uptime-kuma
item.description: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: apple/container
item.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

item.title: InvoiceShelf/InvoiceShelf
item.description: Open Source Invoicing Solution for Individuals & Businesses

item.title: yt-dlp/yt-dlp
item.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

item.description: Self-hosted software and application directory for easy browsing and discovery

item.title: docmost/docmost
item.description: Docmost is an open-source collaborative wiki and documentation software. It is an open-source alternative to Confluence and Notion.

item.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.

item.description: 🔥 Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data. Scrape, crawl and extract with a single API.

item.description: Easy web analytics. No tracking of personal data.

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description: FULL v0, Cursor, Manus, Same.dev, Lovable, Devin, Replit Agent, Windsurf Agent, VSCode Agent, Dia Browser, Trae AI & Cluely (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Tools & AI Models.

item.description: Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.

item.description: Embeddable Postgres with real-time, reactive bindings.

item.description: An easy 1-click way to create beautiful artwork on your PC using AI, with no tech knowledge. Provides a browser UI for generating images from text prompts and images. Just enter your text prompt, and see the generated image.
